paragraphs.text: FAITH

JESUS: The first thing Our Anointed ones must learn from Us is that they need to take the first step of faith and continue in it through much tribulation/trouble My FATHER have scripted for them if they were in holiness enter into the Kingdom of Heaven.
Acts 14:22 Confirming the souls of the disciples, and exhorting them to continue in the faith, and that we must through much tribulation enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
It is through the spirit of faith are their hearts purified by faith. Only the holy and pure in heart shall see Us in the honour of Our holiness.
Matt 5:8 Blessed are those who are pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM.
Heb12:14 Pursue (G1377 "diolo") peace amidst (G3326 "meta") all (situation),
and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH:

Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which knoweth the hearts, bare them witness, giving them the Holy Ghost, even as he did unto us; Act 15:9 And put no difference between us and them, purifying their hearts by faith.

The more Our anointed Ones persevere in faith through tribulations, the more their hearts are purified and sanctified. The song, "Ye are Holiness unto the Lord", which We have inspired you to write was meant to encourage and sanctify them if they meditate on it.

SHEKINAH: David, now I am seeing again that as the Brides and Anointed Ones ascend to the Holy Mountain Zion singing this song, a multitude of angels on both sides of the stairs are sprinkling gold dust on them. I saw certain parts of their body coated with gold as they ascended, singing this song.

JESUS: For their whole life, Satan will always withstand them in their ascent to holiness. He will use seduction, deception, and false ministers to teach them wrong doctrines to mislead them from their destiny.

Act 26:18 to open their eyes, and to turn them from darkness to light, and from the authority of Satan unto THE ELOHIM, that they may receive forgiveness of sins, and inheritance among them which are sanctified of faith (G4102 "Pistis") that is into ( G1519 "eis") me.

Faith involves diligently seeking the knowledge of Our ways of holiness so as to be with Us. These twenty years, We have tested you and have in different ways given you visions, dreams and prophetic words directly and by the hand of Our prophets/prophetess to uphold, console and energize you in faith to persevere in the hope of your calling.
Heb 1:1 THE ELOHIM, who at sundry times and in divers manners spake in time past unto THE FATHERs by the prophets,

Num 12:6 And he said, Hear now my words: If there be a prophet among you, THE YAHWEH will make myself known unto him in a vision, and will speak unto him in a dream. Num 12:7 My servant Moses is not so, who is faithful in all mine house. Num 12:8 With him will I speak mouth to mouth, even apparently, and not in dark speeches; and the similitude of THE YAHWEH shall he behold: wherefore then were ye not afraid to speak against my servant Moses?
You shall be caught up to Us and to your throne like Enoch. When you are converted, establish Our potential Anointed Ones as well.

Heb 11:5 By faith Enoch was translated that he should not see death; and was not found, because THE ELOHIM had translated him: for before his translation he had this testimony, that he pleased THE ELOHIM. Heb 11:6 But without faith it is impossible to please him: for he that cometh to THE ELOHIM must believe that he is, and that he is a rewarder of them that diligently seek him.

Teach them that faith involves obeying what My FATHER has commanded; like walking through the progressive seven levels of holiness as preordained for them in order to be progressively saved/made whole in Our image in holiness to be in Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rom 1:5 By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name:

Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye saved (G4982 "sozo" made whole) through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in CHRIST JESUS unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

For the body without spirit is dead, so faith without works is dead also. The attainment of salvation is not just through faith but also by works of obedience of faith according to My FATHER'S will according to the way he has ordained them to walk.
DAVID: LORD JESUS, are all Christian saved already?
JESUS: The word "salvation" is from G4982 "sozo". It means, "to be saved, healed or made whole".
No, everyone is still in the process of being healed and made whole in their restoration to Our image in holiness through Our Training.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto JESUS the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM. Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds. Heb 12:4 Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin.

Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of the Lord, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom the Lord loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom THE FATHER chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without

chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto THE FATHER of spirits, and live?
Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness.

The truth is Our potential Brides and Anointed Ones are yet to receive their salvation. THE HOLY SPIRIT through Paul spoke of this hope of salvation. If Christians have already obtained their salvation the moment they received Me, why must Paul encourage the church of the Thessalonians to put on breastplate of faith and love; and for a helmet, the hope of salvation.
1Thess 5:8 But let us, who are of the day, be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love; and for a helmet, the hope of salvation.
The truth is that Our salvation is nign and it is high time for My Brides and Anointed Ones to be awaken out of sleep.
Rom 13:11 And that, knowing the time, that now it is high time to awake out of sleep: for now is our salvation nearer than when we believed.

Everyone has to work out his or her own salvation with fear and trembling. Phil 2:12 Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
In the last days, Our salvation will be revealed to those who made it and they shall be clothed with incorruptible and undefiled body.

1Pe 1:4 To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you, 1Pe 1:5 Who are kept by the power of through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.

This will take place after our Anointed ones have overcome the Accuser in the last days by being killed and resurrected. They will receive their salvation that comes with power and authority over the kingdoms of the world.

Rev 12:10 And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and power (G1410 "dunamis"), and the kingdom of our THE ELOHIM, and the authority (G1849 "exousia") of his CHRIST: for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our ELOHIM day and night. Rev 12:11 And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the death.

This is the true gospel of a Christ, an anointed one, to be restored in Our image to manifest Our power and wisdom in the age to come. Faith is just part of this progressive level of holiness unto righteousness.

Rom 1:16 For I am not ashamed of the gospel of a Christ/anointed one for it is the power of THE ELOHIM unto salvation to everyone that believeth; to the Jew first, and also to the Greek. Rom 1:17 For therein is the righteousness of THE ELOHIM revealed from faith to faith: as it is written, the just shall live by faith.
1 Cor 1:24 But unto them which are called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ the power of THE ELOHIM, and the wisdom of THE ELOHIM.

Our Anointed Ones must not waver in faith in Our faithfulness to perform what We have promised them. We will energize them unto holiness and impute them as righteous to further ascend Our other levels of holiness to Heavenly Mount Zion if they are walking uprightly.

Rom 4:20 He staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to THE ELOHIM; Rom 4:21 And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform. Rom 4:22 And therefore it was imputed to him for righteousness. Rom 4:23 Now it was not written for his sake alone, that it was imputed to him; Rom 4:24

But for us also, to whom it shall be imputed, if we believe on him that raised up JESUS our YAHWEH from the dead; Rom 4:25 Who was delivered for our offences, and was raised again for our justification.

This is the sign of their circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith. THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR COEXECUTING

SABRE, shall set a seal on the forehead of Our 144,000 Brides/Anointed Ones after We have imputed them for righteousness through passing Our tests, as We will cause them to pass under Our rod through both of you in pursuing peace in Us in all situations thus keeping Our Covenant of peace. I will purge out among them the rebels and them that transgress against Me.

Rom 4:11 And he received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which he had yet being uncircumcised: that he might be THE FATHER of all them that believe, though they be not circumcised; that righteousness might be imputed unto them also: Rom 4:12 And THE FATHER of circumcision to them who are not of the circumcision only, but who also walk in the steps of that faith of our father Abraham, which he had being yet uncircumcised.
Only those who diligently seek to know My FATHER'S love and has their faith energised by His love will be qualified by both of you to progress to Heavenly Mount Zion.
Gal 5:5 For we through the Spirit wait for the hope of righteousness by faith. Gal 5:6 For in JESUS CHRIST neither circumcision availeth anything, nor circumcision; but faith which worketh by love.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH how you sanctify yourself through faith?

DAVID: When I am going through tribulations, or persecutions, or oppressions or reproaches, I will always encourage myself by singing this song that is inspired by THE HOLY SPIRIT based on Rom 4:2022.

I staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief but was strong in faith giving glory to THE ELOHIM. And being fully persuaded that what He had promised, He was also able to perform. Therefore it was imputed to me for righteousness. I believe, I believe, I believe in you, YAHWEH; I believe, I believe, I believe in you, YAHWEH; I believe, I believe, I believe in you, YAHWEH; I believe I believe I believe in you, YAHWEH.
After singing and confessing this song several times, I felt sanctified by His word. I practise my faith by confession. There is power in our tongue.
Prov 18:21 Death and life are in the power of the tongue: and they that love it shall eat the fruit thereof.
Prov 15:4 A wholesome (curative) tongue is a tree of life: but perverseness (vicious) therein is a breach in the spirit.
JESUS: Have not THE HOLY SPIRIT spoken through Paul in Rom 10:10, "For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation/restoration".
Spoken words are weapons in the spiritual world. It can heal the spirit man with curative words or it can hurt the spirit man with vicious speech.

When My Anointed Ones pray according to Our will, they will receive Our answered prayer. Every promise of THE FATHER is conditional. If they obey and follow His command, they shall eat the good of the land; but if they rebel, they will be in trouble. The Diabolos/Accuser will ask for them to pay the last penny if they sin/miss the mark; they have to be disciplined. If they do well, they will be promoted and be blessed. That is the whole protocol of heaven.

Psa 81:10 I am THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt: open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it. Psa 81:11 But my people would not hearken to my voice; and Israel would none of me. Psa 81:12 So I gave them up unto their own hearts' lust: and they walked in their own counsels. Psa 81:13 Oh that my people had hearkened unto me and Israel had walked in my ways! Psa 81:14 I should soon have subdued their enemies, and turned my hand against their adversaries. Psa 81:15 The haters of THE YAHWEH should have submitted themselves unto him: but their time should have endured for ever. Psa 81:16 He should have fed them also with the finest of the wheat: and with honey out of the rock should I have satisfied thee.

DAVID: LORD JESUS, many were taught that there is no more condemnation for their sins because your blood had cleansed them from all their sins: past, present and future. There is no more need for remembrance of sins or to be conscious or feeling guilty of them because they have no more sins.

JESUS: This doctrine is abominable. These irresponsible teachers misuse and misquote My words out of its correct contexts. They need to read carefully Matthew 7:23, for this is what I will declared openly to them, "Depart from Me, ye lawless ministers, I knew thee not, why doeth you not My FATHER's will?"

Mat 7:13 Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in there at: Mat 7:14 Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it. Mat 7:15 Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves. Mat 7:16 Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles? Mat 7:17 Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit. Mat 7:18 A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit. Mat 7:19 Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire. Mat 7:20 Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them. Mat 7:21 Not everyone that saith unto me, Lord, Lord, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out devils? and in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work lawlessness (G458 "anomia").
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH your understanding and conviction regarding My judgment on the lawless teacher(s) who teaches there is no more condemnation for their sins?

DAVID: SHEKINAIH, if you compare the KJV with the NIV on Rom 8:14, in the NIV version, on Rom 8:1, the part about "who walk not after the flesh" was edited. It is obvious that according to the Greek text, which KJV follow closely, there is condemnation for them that walk in the flesh. Verse 4 in KJV and NIV also affirmed that the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled by those who walk after the spirit, but those who walk after the flesh there will be condemnation.

KJV Rom 8:1 There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ JESUS, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:2 For the law of the Spirit of life in Christ JESUS hath made me free from the law of sin and death. Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, THE ELOHIM sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.

NIV Rom 8:1 Therefore, there is now no condemnation for those who are in Christ JESUS, Rom 8:2 because through Christ JESUS the law of the Spirit who gives life has set you free from the law of sin and death. Rom 8:3 For what the law was powerless to do because it was weakened by the flesh, THE ELOHIM did by sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh to be a sin offering. And so he condemned sin in the flesh, Rom 8:4 in order that the righteous requirement of the law might be fully met in us, who do not live according to the flesh but according to the Spirit.

JESUS: David, you have spoken well. Verily, verily, I say unto all, there shall be condemnation to all who is not walking in the spirit but in the flesh; if not truly repented of by bringing fruit meet for repentance. Be not deceived, My FATHER is not mocked: for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap. For he that soweth to the flesh shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the spirit shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting.

David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH the Revelation I gave you regarding Our judgment on them that walk in the flesh and sin if unrepented? DAVID: If the person walk in the flesh called lust, fornication by living licentiously, I have observed that the same will eventually contact sexual diseases, etc… If one walk in the flesh of covetousness, he/she shall fall into temptation and a snare, and into many foolish and hurtful lusts and end in destruction and perdition.

I have known a brother whose walk is crooked, the same have gangrene in both his legs. However, when he walks in spirit and in truth, his legs healed. I have also seen a sister who is a slanderer, the same have a stroke in her mouth as a warning for slandering THE ELOHIM's anointed one. She later died of sickness in her early fifties. Wherever part of the body sin, which is where it will be inflicted for that is where the accuser will ask for it. As long as anyone walk in the flesh and sin, they will be sentenced if unrepented; but if any walk in the spirit, then there is no condemnation. Why? Because the fruit of the Spirit are love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness, temperance: against such, there is no law to condemn them. Their end is peace and life everlasting.
JESUS: David, you have well spoken. I will continue to expound on faith.

The testing of faith is the testing of the condition of the heart. One thing Our potential Anointed Ones need to take heed is that the heart is easily polluted and made spiritually sick/ungodly. Cursed be Our last days' warrior who compromised and take refuge in their men's wisdom and strength and whose heart departeth from Us.

Jer 17:5 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; Cursed be the warrior (H1397 "geber" valiant) that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from THE YAHWEH. Jer 17:6 For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, in a salt land and not inhabited. Jer 17:7 Blessed is the man that trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and whose hope THE YAHWEH is. Jer 17:8 For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and that spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit. Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted (H6121 "aqob") from all things, and made sick (H605 "anash" wicked, ungodly): who can know it? Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
DAVID: LORD JESUS, How are your potential Anointed Ones going to increase their faith and keep their hearts pure and holy from being polluted from all things and made spiritually sick/ungodly?

JESUS: Faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM. The word "comes" is a continuous action. Our spirit of faith will continue to energize their heart if they continue to hear my spoken word through My spokesmen, especially through THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE

MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE. Their faith shall grow as they hear and kept it in their heart. They shall be sanctified and purified if they are a doer of what they heard. When I speak through you, your heart would burn and fire would come out of your mouth and purify their heart. My word like hammer will demolish their stronghold of carnal mindedness.
Ps 39:3 My heart was hot within me, while I was musing the fire burned: then spake I with my tongue,

Jer 23:28 The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully. What is the chaff to the wheat? Saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 23:29 Is not my word like as a fire? saith THE YAHWEH ; and like a hammer that breaketh the rock in pieces?

At times, My heavier anointing like a blanket will come upon you. This is My massa/burden (Hab 1:1) and you will fel like Elihu feeling burden on your shoulder and the tightness in your stomach, like a wineskin that is going to burst due to overfilling of wine, and you will have to speak out My prophetic oracle so that your spirit may be released from the pressure and be refreshed.

Job 32:17 I said, I will answer also my part, I also will shew mine opinion. Job 32:18 For I am full of matter, the spirit within me constraineth me. Job 32:19 Behold, my belly is as wine which hath no vent; it is ready to burst like new bottles. Job 32:20 I will speak, that I may be refreshed: I will open my lips and answer.

As a person hears and receives My teaching through you, and believe in the visions We gave through SHEKINAIH, his faith will grow, and he will be sanctified and purified in his spirit and be renovated in his mind to be able to submit to THE FATHER in progressive holiness to ascend Heavenly Mount Zion.

2Th 2:13 But we are bound to give thanks always to THE ELOHIM for you, brethren beloved of THE YAHWEH, because THE ELOHIM hath from the beginning chosen you to salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief of the truth:
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost;

This is what I did through both of you in China. Complemented with visions through SHEKINAIH, I spoke through you for 17 hours in a day with only about three fifteen minutes break. The congregation did not hunger for physical food even though you asked them to go for their meal. Why? Their spirit man were hungry for more of Our oracles; for the words I spoke through you are spirit and life. Their faith is in Our demonstration of the spirit and in Our power and not in man's wisdom and excellency of speech.

1Co 2:4 And my speech and my preaching was not with enticing words of man's wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power: 1Co 2:5 That your faith should not stand in the wisdom of men, but in the power of THE ELOHIM. 1 Co 2:12 Now we have received, not the spirit of the world, but the spirit which is of THE ELOHIM; that we might know the things that are freely given to us of THE ELOHIM. 1 Co 2:13 Which things also we speak, not in the words which man's wisdom teacheth, but which the Holy Ghost teacheth; comparing spiritual with spiritual.

In addition, My potential Anointed Ones need an energy that is called the love of THE FATHER to energise their faith. How can they know the love of THE FATHER until they have experienced His love? How can they experience His love unless they are desperate for His love because of afflictions and necessities? David, would you like to share your experience regarding THE FATHER's love with SHEKINAIH?

DAVID: THE FATHER is so merciful to me because He has not stopped talking to me through visions and dreams for the past twenty years to assure me of my destiny. Thus, my faith grew because I was always meditating on these visions, dreams and His prophetic words. I have always recorded them and sometimes turned them into songs. I would meditate on them and remind myself of His promises.

King David of old, in the beginning of his troubles had no one to turn to. Therefore he always encouraged himself in THE YAHWEH by singing and pouring out his heart with prophetic songs to THE YAHWEH. These became the Book of Psalms
When the people turned against him and wanted to stone him because the Amalekites had taken all their wives and children, David kept his peace. He encouraged himself in The Name of THE YAHWEH.

That is what I did. I do not look for someone to place my faith on nor seek I for the wisdom of man. I encourage myself in THE YAHWEH by meditating on His promises and hold on to the hope of my calling by meditating and singing Psalms spontaneously.
This has become my shield in my fight of faith against the fiery darts and lies of the Accuser.

1Ti 6:12 Fight the good fight of faith, lay hold on eternal life, whereunto thou art also called, and hast professed a good profession before many witnesses. Eph 6:16 Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.

JESUS: David, We have orchestrated you to experience the suffering of King David of old so that you can relate and comfort those who are in many troubles by the consolation you received from My FATHER of mercy and all comfort. The songs We inspired you to write based on Psalms are meant for My Brides and Anointed Ones for their edification and sanctification. The Prophets and the Law are but shadow of the real things to come. You are My King David that is to come. Our spiritual Solomon will acknowledge you as their father and the tabernacle of David shall be restored.

This must be the foundation of Our potential Anointed Ones: the hope to be part of Heavenly Mount Zion and also to be my Bride. If they do not seriously take hold of this hope, they will not seek to increase in faith.
David, do you have faith in THE FATHER'S love?

DAVID: I truly believe I have faith in THE FATHER'S love. Why? I am convicted in what THE FATHER has promised me. I am convicted of whom I am. I am convicted of my calling. I am convicted of my destiny. Why? Because I have done my diligent investigation. I have sought and dug it out. I have researched all about His Way. I have purposed in my heart to please Him. I am going to hold on to THE FATHER to the last breath. I will still believe Him even if things did not turn out to be what He has promised. Even if my family leaves me or my children leave me or all my relatives leave me and I am all alone, I will still hold on to Him until the end. This is my conviction. THE FATHER had put me through many tests and I have yet to forsake Him. I have given up everything, sold everything, denied Myself and surrendered my right. I know nothing can separate me from THE FATHER'S love.

JESUS: Well spoken, all Our potential Anointed Ones who believed THE FATHER has called them as a Christ have to forsake all, deny themselves, and carry the cross. That is the path of the anointed ones. They have to carry the cross, die to themselves, and follow my footsteps. They have to go through whatever I went through submitting to THE FATHER one hundred percent until death.

Heb11:5 By faith Enoch was translated that he should not see death; and was not found, because THE ELOHIM had translated him: for before his translation he had this testimony, that he pleased THE ELOHIM. Heb 11:6 But without faith it is impossible to please him: for he that cometh to THE ELOHIM must believe that he is, and that he is a rewarder of them that diligently seek him.

THE FATHER: Give Me a man of faith and I will show you a holy man. Nothing moves me more that the faith of the afflicted. If I can find a man of faith just like Abraham, he will be my friend because he pleases Me. Though I disciplined and tested him while everybody was running away from Me and gave up seeking Me, he still cried for more of Me and still believed in Me and that touched Me.

JESUS: Our potential Anointed Ones need this type of faith if they are to come out of the Great Tribulation because if We do not have this faith in the last days, they will be damned and not be able to reach the Heavenly Mount Zion. Rev 13:10 He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity: he that killeth with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the patience and the faith of the saints.
